title: UXUI UI Layer Schema
description: Schema for ui.json — the top layer of the split-architecture design system. Contains page compositions, marketing sections, and multi-step flows. References patterns, components, and design tokens via brace-ref syntax. Downward refs only: ui → patterns → components → design.

ref.description: Cross-file reference using brace syntax. Format: {scope.path.to.thing}. Allowed scopes: design, components, patterns, ui. Direction: ui may reference patterns/components/design only (downward).

refOrInline.description: Either a brace ref to a component/pattern, or an inline HTML/markup string for one-off content.

oneOf.description: Inline HTML/markup snippet. Use sparingly — prefer refs to organisms.

metaBlock.description: Page <head> metadata. Values may be plain strings or refs to design tokens / shared assets.

composesArray.description: Ordered list of refs that compose this page/section. Prefer organism refs over molecule/atom refs — if you find yourself composing atoms directly here, promote the composition into a molecule or organism in components.json first.

slotFills.description: When `pattern` is set, fill that pattern's named slots. Keys are slot names defined by the pattern; values are refs to components or inline markup.

PageDef.description: A full screen / route. Either uses a pattern (with slot_fills) OR composes components directly — not both.

id.description: Stable identifier for this page. Used in flow transitions and analytics. snake_case or kebab-case.

summary.description: Short human-readable description of the page's purpose.

pattern.description: Optional. A pattern this page is built on (e.g. {patterns.auth-split}). When set, `slot_fills` should provide the pattern's slot content.

composes.description: Direct component composition. Use when not using a pattern. Prefer organism refs.

html_template.description: Path to the rendered HTML file for this page, relative to project root. Convention: pages/<page_id>.html

oneOf.description: Direct composition page: requires `composes`, forbids `pattern` and `slot_fills`.

SectionDef.description: A reusable marketing block (hero, pricing-table, feature-grid, testimonial-row, footer-cta). Composed of components, may live inline on a page or in its own file.

html_template.description: Optional path to a standalone HTML partial for this section.

FlowStep.description: One step in a multi-step flow. `page` is a ref to a ui.page entry; `transitions` map event names to the next page ref (or external URL).

transitions.description: Event-name → destination ref. Common keys: on_success, on_back, on_skip, on_error, on_cancel.

FlowDef.description: A multi-step user sequence (signup, checkout, onboarding). Steps reference ui.page entries and declare transitions between them.

MetaBlock.description: File-level metadata. Pins schema version, scope, dependencies, and DTCG alignment.

schema.description: Schema identifier and version. Bumped per-skill (no library-wide major).

scope.description: What this file is allowed to contain. Used by audit tool to enforce scope-key separation.

depends_on.description: Files this file references via brace-refs. Audit tool resolves refs against these.

dtcg_version.description: Pinned DTCG (Design Tokens Community Group) spec version. Brace-ref syntax matches DTCG alias syntax — future Style Dictionary transforms read tokens directly.

version.description: Semver version of this specific ui.json file's content.

generated_by.description: Optional. Skill name + version that wrote this file.

page.description: Map of page_name → PageDef. Page names should match the page id.

section.description: Map of section_name → SectionDef. Reusable marketing/page blocks.

flow.description: Map of flow_name → FlowDef. Multi-step sequences with declared transitions.
